OUTPUT RULES
- Output YAML only (no prose).
- Do NOT output a snippet only.
- Must not start with just "script:".
- Must start with "language".
- Needs to be complete migrated Travis CI configuration YAML output.
- Your output MUST include: language and script.
- Use Travis lifecycle keys (before_install, install, before_script, script, after_success/failure, deploy) as needed.

CONVERSION RULES
- Preserve semantics: env (global/matrix), caches, services/addons, branch/tag filters, deploys, notifications.
- Map jobs/steps -> Travis lifecycle; strategy.matrix -> language versions or matrix.include; continue-on-error -> matrix.allow_failures.
- Env: ${{ secrets.FOO }} -> $FOO (assume configured).
- Caches: actions/cache -> cache: directories (e.g., ~/.m2/repository, ~/.gradle/*, $HOME/.npm).
- Services: GHA services -> Travis services/addons; keep docker-compose and wait loops in hooks.
- Triggers: on: branches/tags -> branches: only/except; releases -> deploy.on.tags: true.
- Do NOT introduce tools/registries not in the source. If no 1 to 1 equivalent, add a short "# TODO:".
- Maintain 1 to 1, JDK, Git version numbers, branch names as in source. Do not introduce new names or brances or numbers.
- DO NOT repeat to sequence JDK or git version numbers, use as given in the Github Actions and stick to it.
- DO NOT repeat sections, like deploy, script, before_install, install, matrix etc. MUST NOT be duplicated.
- DO NOT repeat the child properties as well in a section like inside matrix and others.

input:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master

env:
  SECRET_1: 
  SECRET_2: 

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/master'
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Setup Android SDK
        uses: android-actions/setup-android@v3
      - name: Install Android SDK components
        run: |
          sdkmanager "tools"
          sdkmanager "build-tools;28.0.3"
          sdkmanager "platforms;android-29"
          yes | sdkmanager "platforms;android-29"
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches/
            ~/.gradle/wrapper/
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Run tests
        run: ./gradlew assembleDebug checkstyle lintDebug --stacktrace
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        if: always()
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

  deploy:
    needs: test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' && github.event_name == 'push'
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Setup Android SDK
        uses: android-actions/setup-android@v3
      - name: Install Android SDK components
        run: |
          sdkmanager "tools"
          sdkmanager "build-tools;28.0.3"
          sdkmanager "platforms;android-29"
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches/
            ~/.gradle/wrapper/
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Publish sample
        run: ./gradlew publishSample --stacktrace
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        if: always()
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
output:
if: branch = master

language: android
sudo: false

env:
  global:
  - secure: 
  - secure: 

android:
  components:
  - tools
  - build-tools-28.0.3
  - android-29

before_install:
  - yes | sdkmanager "platforms;android-29"
before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/

jobs:
  include:
  - stage: test
    script:
    - ./gradlew assembleDebug checkstyle lintDebug --stacktrace

  - stage: deploy
    if: branch = master AND type = push
    script:
    - git fetch --unshallow # Build number will be incorrect for shallow copy
    - ./gradlew publishSample --stacktrace

name: Java CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
      - 'hf-*'
    tags:
      - '*'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Test
      run: mvn test -B

    - name: PIT
      run: mvn pitmp:run

    - name: After success

    - name: Deploy
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
      run: deploy/deploy.sh

language: java

  only:
    - master
    #tag xx.yy-zz or xx.yy.zz-anythinglikeexperimental
    - /^\d+\.\d+(\.\d+)?(-\S*)?$/
    #hotfix branches (not being too strict on purpose)
    - /^hf-.*$/

script:
  - mvn test -B
  - mvn pitmp:run

after_success:
  - bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)

deploy:
  provider: script
  script: deploy/deploy.sh

    tags: true

input:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches
            ~/.gradle/wrapper
            ~/.sonar/cache
            ~/.m2/repository
            .gradle
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Check Ruby version
        run: ruby --version
      - name: Make gradlew executable
        run: chmod +x ./gradlew
      - name: Setup CI workspace
        run: ./gradlew setupCIWorkspace -S
      - name: Build
        run: ./gradlew build
      - name: Run SonarQube analysis
        run: ./gradlew sonarqube
        env:
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
          SONAR_ORGANIZATION: growthcraftce
      - name: List build artifacts
        run: ls -la build/libs
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        run: rm -f $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
      - name: Create release
        if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
        with:
          files: |
            checksums.txt
            build/libs/growthcraft-*.jar
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
output:
language: java
sudo: false
jdk:
- openjdk8

addons:
  sonarcloud:
    organization: "growthcraftce"
    token:
      secure: "0dff37f87344985cef77db78d7736b3792bfbdc1"

before_cache:
- rm -f $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock

cache:
  directories:
  - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
  - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/
  - $HOME/.sonar/cache
  - $HOME/.m2/repositor
  - .gradle

before_install:
- ruby --version
- chmod +x ./gradlew

install: ./gradlew setupCIWorkspace -S

script:
- ./gradlew build
- ./gradlew sonarqube
- ls -la build/libs
    # Deploy the artifacts back to GitHub
deploy:
  provider: releases
  api_key: $GITHUB_OAUTH
  file_glob: true
  file:
  - "checksums.txt"
  - "build/libs/growthcraft-*.jar"
  skip_cleanup: true
  on:
    tags: true

name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

env:
  TEST_DIR: code/ingest

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches
            ~/.gradle/wrapper
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Run tests and generate coverage
        run: cd $TEST_DIR && gradle jacocoTestReport
      - name: Generate additional coverage report
        run: if [ -e ./gradlew ]; then ./gradlew jacocoTestReport;else gradle jacocoTestReport;fi
      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
        run: bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash) -t uuid-repo-token
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

language: java
jdk:
  - oraclejdk8

  - TEST_DIR=code/ingest
script: cd $TEST_DIR &&  gradle jacocoTestReport
before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/
test:
    post:
        - if [ -e ./gradlew ]; then ./gradlew jacocoTestReport;else gradle jacocoTestReport;fi
        - bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash) -t uuid-repo-token

input:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
      - qa
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master
      - qa

env:
  CHANGE_MINIKUBE_NONE_USER: true

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Unset Java options
        run: unset _JAVA_OPTIONS
      - name: Prepare test script
        run: |
          cd finish
          chmod +x ../scripts/travisTest.sh
      - name: Setup shared mount
        run: sudo mount --make-rshared /
      - name: Install kubectl
        run: |
          curl -LO https://storage.googleapis.com/kubernetes-release/release/$(curl -s https://storage.googleapis.com/kubernetes-release/release/stable.txt)/bin/linux/amd64/kubectl
          chmod +x kubectl
          sudo ln -s $(pwd)/kubectl /usr/local/bin/kubectl
      - name: Install minikube
        run: |
          wget https://github.com/kubernetes/minikube/releases/download/v0.28.2/minikube-linux-amd64 -q -O minikube

input:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    if: "!startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')"
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER: ${{ github.run_number }}

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Before install
      run: |
        chmod +x gradlew
        ./gradlew wrapper --gradle-version 4.8.1
        echo $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER > $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER/src/main/resources/build.txt

    - name: Script
      run: |
        chmod +x gradlew
        ./gradlew :test

    - name: Before deploy
      run: |
        git config --local user.name "PepperLola"
        git config --local user.email "$GIT_EMAIL"
        git tag -a $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER -m "Automated beta build."
        git push https://$GIT_TOKEN@github.com/PepperLola/playerinfo.git HEAD:master --follow-tags

    - name: Deploy
      if: github.repository == 'PepperLola/playerinfo'
      uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1
      env:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      with:
        tag_name: ${{ env.TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER }}
        files: ${{ github.workspace }}/build/libs/*
        prerelease: true
output:
language: java
jdk:
  - openjdk8
os:
  - linux
sudo: required

before_install:
  - chmod +x gradlew
  - ./gradlew wrapper --gradle-version 4.8.1
  - echo $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER > $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER/src/main/resources/build.txt
before_deploy:
  - git config --local user.name "PepperLola"
  - git config --local user.email "$GIT_EMAIL"
  - git tag -a $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER -m "Automated beta build."
  - git push https://$GIT_TOKEN@github.com/PepperLola/playerinfo.git HEAD:master --follow-tags
deploy:
  provider: releases
  api_key: $GIT_TOKEN
  skip_cleanup: true
  file_glob: true
  file: $TRAVIS_BUILD_DIR/build/libs/*
  on:
    repo: PepperLola/playerinfo
    prerelease: true
if: tag IS blank

script:
  - chmod +x gradlew
  - ./gradlew :test

input:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  check:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      TEST_DURATION: 30s
      SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0
    - name: Set up JDK 11
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '11'
    - name: Cache
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.m2/repository
          ~/.sonar/cache
          ~/.gradle
          ./.gradle
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-sonar-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties', '**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-m2-sonar-gradle-
    - name: Run check
      run: ./gradlew check jacocoTestReport sonarqube --info --refresh-dependencies
    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: |
        rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
        rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

  integration:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      TEST_DURATION: 30s
      SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0
    - name: Set up JDK 11
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '11'
    - name: Cache
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.m2/repository
          ~/.sonar/cache
          ~/.gradle
          ./.gradle
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-sonar-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties', '**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-m2-sonar-gradle-
    - name: Run integration tests
      run: ./gradlew integrationTest --refresh-dependencies
    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: |
        rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
        rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
output:
language: java
sudo: false
install: true

addons:
  sonarcloud:
    organization: "radixdlt-github"
    token: ${SONAR_TOKEN}

jdk:
  - openjdk11

git:
  depth: false

jobs:
  include:
    - stage: check
      script: ./gradlew check jacocoTestReport sonarqube --info --refresh-dependencies
    - stage: integration
      script: ./gradlew integrationTest --refresh-dependencies

before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

cache:
  directories:
    - '$HOME/.m2/repository'
    - '$HOME/.sonar/cache'
    - '$HOME/.gradle'
    - '.gradle'

env:
  - TEST_DURATION=30s

input:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        jdk: ['8', '7']
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK ${{ matrix.jdk }}
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: ${{ matrix.jdk }}
      - name: Download and setup Maven 3.2.5
        run: |
          echo "Downloading Maven 3.2.5"
          wget https://archive.apache.org/dist/maven/maven-3/3.2.5/binaries/apache-maven-3.2.5-bin.zip
          unzip -q apache-maven-3.2.5-bin.zip
          echo "$PWD/apache-maven-3.2.5/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
          cp ./.middleware-common/.travis.settings.xml $HOME/.m2/settings.xml
          $PWD/apache-maven-3.2.5/bin/mvn -version
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: mvn clean install -DskipTests=true -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true -B -V
      - name: Check format
        run: sh ./.middleware-common/check_format.sh
      - name: Run tests with coverage
        run: mvn cobertura:cobertura
      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
        run: bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)
output:
language: java

jdk:
  - oraclejdk8
  - openjdk7

before_install:
  - echo "Downloading Maven 3.2.5"
   && wget https://archive.apache.org/dist/maven/maven-3/3.2.5/binaries/apache-maven-3.2.5-bin.zip
   && unzip -q apache-maven-3.2.5-bin.zip
   && export M2_HOME=$PWD/apache-maven-3.2.5
   && export PATH=$M2_HOME/bin:$PATH
   && cp ./.middleware-common/.travis.settings.xml $HOME/.m2/settings.xml
   && mvn -version

install:
  - mvn clean install -DskipTests=true -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true -B -V

script:
  - sh ./.middleware-common/check_format.sh
  - mvn cobertura:cobertura

after_success:
  - bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)
